name: Destroy Darkness
description: You target an undead or dark creature within a moderate (20 unit) distance and strike them with purifying light. If your spell check beats the target's resilience, they take 15 divine damage. If your spell check doubles their resilience, they are instantly destroyed instead.
charge: The spell becomes a 5 unit radius centered on yourself, but only affecting all standard tier and lower undead or dark creatures in the area.
